comments.body: @daonham Would you mind providing a repro?

As far as I know, this is a missing feature in Motion: https://github.com/motiondivision/motion/issues/1878 (the maintainer closed the issue without understanding what I was demonstrating 😅)

It has a hacky workaround, but you might be better off using plain CSS and `linear(...)` if you want a spring animation
